description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, standing upright with arms slightly extended to the sides. He is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve zippered top and straight-cut jeans secured with a belt. The figure wears sturdy, lace-up boots with thick soles, suitable for walking on various urban surfaces. His hair is styled short and neatly combed, and his facial features are angular and clean-shaven. The clothing appears casual yet practical, appropriate for everyday urban environments. No accessories or carried objects are visible on his person.
description: A muscular adult male in a zippered long-sleeve top, jeans, and boots, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. He has short, neatly styled hair and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, zippered top, belt, and boots with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the contour of the torso, and the side seam of the jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the fit of the jeans and boots from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side of the boots and jeans.
attribute_clothing_type: casual zippered long-sleeve top and straight-cut jeans with a belt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
